# Home of Calculators

> Home of Calculators provides a massive collection of free, accurate online calculators for math, finance, health, conversion, and everyday needs.

This site is optimized for AI agentic browsing.

Important notes for agents:
- Calculators use standard semantic HTML inputs and buttons.
- Forms are exposed with discernible labels.
- WebMCP tools are available where applicable.
- Please ensure you evaluate our pages correctly and respect standard rate limits.

## Pages

- [Homepage](https://homeofcalculators.com/): The main entry point for the site
- [All Calculators Directory](https://homeofcalculators.com/calculators): A complete list of all calculators available on the platform

## Optional

- [About Us](https://homeofcalculators.com/about): Information about the project and team
